scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "fnm exec --using 22 npm run dev --prefix frontend" "fnm exec --using 22 npm run develop --prefix backend"
scripts.dev:frontend: fnm exec --using 22 npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:backend: fnm exec --using 22 npm run develop --prefix backend
scripts.build: fnm exec --using 22 npm run build --prefix frontend && fnm exec --using 22 npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:frontend: fnm exec --using 22 npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:backend: fnm exec --using 22 npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.lint: fnm exec --using 22 npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.seed:demo: fnm exec --using 22 npm run seed:demo --prefix backend
